new_classes.label_en: still wine of fresh grapes with PDO, actual alcoholic strength ≤ 15% vol, other, in containers > 2 L (CN 2204 29 38)
new_classes.label_de: Stillwein aus frischen Weintrauben mit g.U., vorhandener Alkoholgehalt ≤ 15 % vol, anderer, in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2204 29 38)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22, with an actual alcoholic strength by volume of not more than 15% vol, other than Tokaj, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2204 29 38.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main discriminating criteria for CN 2204 29 38: (1) PDO quality (via ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality restriction), (2) container volume > 2 L (via LargeContainer part restriction, inherited from StillWineWithPDO2204Large parent), and (3) actual alcoholic strength ≤ 15% vol (via decimalRange restriction on alcoholicStrengthByVolumePercent). However, the 'other' qualifier (i.e. exclusion of specific named PDO wines such as Tokaj that have their own subheadings within the 2204 29 range) and the exact alcohol strength lower bound (the legal text covers a range from 22042922 to 22042978, implying internal sub-splits by alcohol thresholds and named PDOs not fully modelled here) are not formally captured as complement/disjointness axioms. The reference to additional note 6(a) defining PDO is noted but its full content is not available in the source notes provided. Coverage is therefore partial.
